calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-27-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mortimer H. Hertzstein, Esq., 415-585-2095 moving to be relieved as counsel for defendant LEE ROY LISKEY.

RULING:
MORTIMER H. HERZSTEIN. ESQ'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT LEE ROY LISKEY IS GRANTED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge Paul H. Alvarado, Reporter Robert Balian CSR # 5220. (301/PHA)

Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Notice Of Oppositin To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jan-06-2004 Denied

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-08-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: V. Mack/M. Vallejo, CSR: LaVon Granger
Appearances:
Paul John Dion, Esq. for Plaintiff California Pacific Medical Center.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: California Pacific Medical Center and against the defendant: Lee Liskey
As follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at: 45 Castro Street, Suite 421, San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the lease.
Back Rent of $57,878.15
Attorney's fees of $11,288.95
Costs of $356.95
For the total of $69,524.05
Judgment signed in open court.

Motion To Set Aside Default And Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-02-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Richard Hurlburt, Esq. of GREENSTEIN, HURLBURT & MCDONALD 642-7300, for defendant Lee Liskey, M.D. moving to set aside default and judgment
Paul John Dion, Esq. of JONES, BOTHWELL & DION 951-8900, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court took DEFENDANT LEE LISKEY, M.D.'s Motion To Set Aside Default And Judgment under submission. (REQ/301/CW) Reporter: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
